main.description: Resolve the node's current envelope manifest pointer for a ciphertext CID. This endpoint requires operator authorization. Clients should use this pointer before reads or manifest rotation so stale manifest CIDs are not reused after grant or revoke. The endpoint only returns a pointer when the current manifest body is still readable.

ct_cid.description: Ciphertext CID whose current envelope manifest should be resolved.
Ciphertext CID requested by the caller.

manifest_cid.description: Current envelope manifest CID for the ciphertext.
